channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A 'ghost' great white shark reopens a 160-year Mediterranean mystery
item.description: The capture of a juvenile great white shark in Spain offers new evidence that the Mediterranean's elusive 'ghost' population of great whites still exists.

item.title: Ancient life signs discovered in an unexpected location surprise scientists
item.description: Scientists found unexpected wrinkle patterns in ancient seafloor rocks in Morocco, suggesting signs of life where they were not anticipated.

item.title: Study finds fructose does not curb hunger like glucose does
item.description: A new study shows that fructose and glucose may appear identical on labels, but the brain processes them differently. In mice, glucose strongly...

item.title: Goldfish can transform from pets to ecosystem destroyers
item.description: A new study reveals that goldfish can do more than survive in the wild—they can fundamentally reshape freshwater ecosystems. Researchers found the...
